sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁר

Transliteration: 'ăsher

Phonetic: ash-er'

BDB Definition:

  1. (relative participle)
    1. which, who
    2. that which
  2. (conjunction)
    1. that (in object clause)
    2. when
    3. since
    4. as
    5. conditional if

Origin: a primitive relative pronoun (of every gender and number)

TWOT entry: 184

Part(s) of speech:
